message:
feat(core): add immediate-ack/deferred-completion UX protocol (ft-2p9cb.6.3.1)

AckPhase, CompletionReason, AckToken, DeferredResult, AckProtocolConfig,
ProgressUpdate, AckProtocolSnapshot, AckProtocolDegradation, AckProtocolLogEntry,
AckProtocolManager with issue_ack, complete, sweep_timeouts, record_slow_ack,
snapshot, detect_degradation, log_entry, reset. 27 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
